summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QuizHub room-based flow. Backend APIs are 100% functional, admin interface works perfectly, player interface has minor integration issue with lobby transition.

integration_issues.issue: After successful join API call (201 status), player interface doesn't transition to lobby screen
integration_issues.symptoms: Join API succeeds but UI remains on join screen, possibly WebSocket connection timing issue

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns ok with version 1.0.0
POST /api/admin/auth with PIN '1234' returns admin token
POST /api/questions/add adds questions (admin token required)
POST /api/room/create fails without questions, succeeds with questions
POST /api/room/create generates 6-char room code and shareable link
GET /api/room/info?code=CODE returns room status for valid codes
GET /api/room/info?code=INVALID returns 404 for invalid codes
POST /api/join requires both room_code and nickname
POST /api/join with wrong room code returns 404
POST /api/join with correct room code creates player (201 status)
POST /api/game/start triggers countdown (admin token required)
Full game flow: countdown -> question -> timer -> reveal -> next -> finished
WebSocket /api/ws endpoint accessible and functional
Frontend Admin: PIN screen authentication (rejects wrong PIN, accepts 1234)
Frontend Admin: Setup screen with question form and validation
Frontend Admin: Can add multiple questions with options and correct answer
Frontend Admin: Create Quiz Room button properly disabled/enabled based on questions
Frontend Admin: Room lobby shows room code prominently with shareable link
Frontend Admin: WebSocket status shows 'Live' with green indicator
Frontend Admin: Start Game button correctly disabled when no players
Frontend Player: Shows room code input + nickname input + Join Room button
Frontend Player: URL param ?room=CODE pre-fills room code correctly
Frontend Player: Form validation works (shows errors for missing fields)
Frontend Player: Shows appropriate error for invalid room codes
Frontend Player: No Start Game button or Next Question button (correct behavior)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix player lobby transition issue: After successful join API call, ensure WebSocket connection is established and player UI transitions to lobby screen. Check WebSocket event handling in app.js for 'player_joined' or 'players_update' events.
